items.name: Columbina's Full Chibi Layered Dress
items.description:
Columbina's Outfit from Genshin Impact! Sleeves + Coats + Inner Coats + Wings + Pendants all in one! Modeled + Textured with No Quality Loss! [It took me more than 4 days :3]

It's mainly supported for Chibi Dolls, but can be used on ALL TOO!
